title: The Quiet Move
summary: The move that kills without a check

steps.title: The Hardest Move to See
steps.text: Amateurs see checks and captures easily. Masters see QUIET moves — moves that don't attack anything immediately but create an unstoppable threat. These are hardest to spot because they're not "noisy."

steps.title: The Training
steps.text: When you're sure you've found the win, always ask: "Is there a QUIET move that's even better?" Sometimes stepping BACK with a rook or bishop creates devastating threats. Train yourself to consider them.
